name: Color Tokens
description: Semantic color tokens grouped by characteristic. These are the only color tokens you should consume — they adapt automatically to light/dark mode and theming.

actionable.description: Interactive elements: buttons, links, clickable controls.

navigable.description: Navigation elements: nav items, tabs, breadcrumbs.

status.description: Status indicators: info, success, warning, error states.

selectable.description: Selection controls: checkboxes, radio buttons, selection states.

editable.description: Editable fields: inputs, text areas, editable content.

container.description: Surfaces and containers: panels, cards, sections.

content.description: Text and labels: primary and secondary content.

rules: Always use characteristic tokens — never foundation or palette tokens directly.
Always pair background and foreground from the same characteristic.
All tokens resolve correctly in both light and dark mode.
